data.name: Internal_ServerError_Detail
data.value: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

data.name: Validation_InvalidModel_Detail
data.value: One or more validation errors occurred.

data.name: Rpc_Generic_Detail
data.value: The request could not be completed.

data.name: AccountException_PrimaryEmailCannotBeRemoved_Detail
data.value: The primary email address for account {0} cannot be removed.

data.name: EmailException_NotFound_Detail
data.value: The email address '{0}' was not found.

data.name: EmailException_AlreadyCreated_Detail
data.value: The email address '{0}' is already registered.

data.name: EmailException_NotConfirmed_Detail
data.value: The email address '{0}' is not confirmed.

data.name: EmailException_AlreadyConfirmed_Detail
data.value: The email address '{0}' is already confirmed.

data.name: ExternalAccountException_NotFound_Detail
data.value: The external account for {0} ({1}) was not found.

data.name: ExternalAccountException_AlreadyCreated_Detail
data.value: The external account for {0} ({1}) is already linked.

data.name: ConfirmationException_NotFound_Detail
data.value: No confirmation code was found or it has expired.

data.name: ConfirmationException_Mismatch_Detail
data.value: The confirmation code does not match.

data.name: ConfirmationException_AlreadySent_Detail
data.value: A confirmation has already been sent. Please wait before requesting again.
